title: taraxacum abbreviatulum
intro: Taraxacum abbreviatulum, also known as the dwarf dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is used medicinally for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Taraxacum abbreviatulum include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and act as a natural diuretic to reduce water retention. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum abbreviatulum can be found in tea, tinctures, and capsules, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
